de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class ModelExtractor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.ModelExtractor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PipeListener<SolverCommunication>

    public class ModelExtractor
extends Object
implements PipeListener<SolverCommunication>
    Class for sending queries to the solver and extracting the relevant information regarding the model.
    Author:
    mihai
